MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF M FRANK NAVARRO
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RUDY BALDERAMA FOR DEFENDANT MARK D JOHANSEN

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 590 PARIS STREET. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, WITH A STAY OF EXECUTION TO 6AM, 11/20/05. NO FURTHER STATYS ALLOWED. LEASE FORFEITED. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE NEUTRAL LETTER OF RECOMMENDATION. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. IF DEFENDANT VACATES, KEYS RETURNED,NO ONE ELSE REMAINING AND INSPECTION MADE, PLAINTIFF WILL PAY DEFENDANT $700 (MOVE-OUT EXPENSE)IN CASH.DEFENDANT TO SIGN RECEIPT OF PAYMENT. PLAINTIFF WILL SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT AGREES THAT THERE ARE NO OTHER CLAIMANTS RIGHT TO POSSESSION. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEF, DEEMED ABANDONED. DEFENDANT CAN VACATE ON AN EARLIER DATE. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:GUY STILSON;CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE (218)
